description_long: This street light features a tall, slender metal pole with a dual-arm configuration at the top, each arm extending outward symmetrically to support a modern, streamlined lamp head. The lamp heads are elongated and slightly curved, designed for efficient light distribution over a wide area, typical of urban roadways or intersections. Midway up the pole, there is a diamond-shaped sign or panel, likely for traffic or informational purposes. The base of the pole is slightly flared, providing stability and a subtle visual anchor. The overall design is utilitarian with a focus on function, lacking decorative embellishments. The finish is a uniform metallic gray, giving it a contemporary and unobtrusive appearance suitable for city environments.
description: A tall, dual-arm street light with modern, streamlined lamp heads and a diamond-shaped sign on a plain metallic pole. The design is functional and contemporary, ideal for urban streets.
description_view_0: A direct side view showing the narrow profile of the pole and the lamp heads, with the diamond-shaped sign visible as a thin line.
description_view_1: A frontal view displaying both outward-extending arms with lamp heads, the diamond-shaped sign clearly visible at mid-height.
description_view_2: The opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the pole and lamp heads in a narrow profile and the sign as a thin line.
description_view_3: A rear view similar to the front, showing both lamp arms and the diamond-shaped sign, with the same symmetrical arrangement.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Modern, streamlined, elongated lamp heads with a slightly curved profile and integrated diffusers, designed for efficient light spread and minimal decorative elements.
